title: Name/secure the Access+License+PII reviewer (blocking role)
context: Every per-dataset deliverable requires sign-off from a named Access+License+PII reviewer; this role is blocking and must exist before the pilot is reviewed. Binding guardrail: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access and identifiable data are EXCLUDED at gate-002; provenance on every assertion; the deliverable is documentation about the data, never the data itself. This task identifies and secures that reviewer and records the review responsibilities.
objective: Identify and secure a named Access+License+PII reviewer and document the role's scope and sign-off responsibilities.
acceptanceCriteria: A named individual (or clearly scoped role) is recorded as the Access+License+PII reviewer, secured before the pilot (pilot-008) review.
Review scope is documented: confirms accessTier, license permitsDerivatives with cited evidence, and PII methodology applied per gate-002 before any dataset PASSes.
Escalation/refusal path documented: controlled/identifiable or unclear-license datasets are EXCLUDED/FLAGGED and never silently approved.
